title: SNAP TRAINING AND EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SELF SUFFICIENCY ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE SNAP TRAINING AND EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists SNAP recipients to gain skills, training, work experience, and employment to increase their ability to obtain living-wage employment. May be able to cover the cost of training, textbooks, gas, bus tickets, housing and utility costs, and work clothes. 500 Summer Street NE E48 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: The STEP program is for people in Oregon who: -Are receiving SNAP benefits, -Are at least 16 years old, and -Are not receiving TANF benefits. The ABAWD program is for people in Oregon who: -Ages 18-49 -No children under 18 years old on their SNAP case -Do not meet an exemption or live in an exempt county Hours: Monday- Friday 8am-5pm - (833) 947-1964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (833) 947-1964 INTAKE PROCEDURE: STEP: Contant local DHS office and ask for a referral AWAWD: Request participation or exemption: Call or email Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of SNAP benefits LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Employment Related Transportation * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Job Finding Assistance Job Finding Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Job Training Formats * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON TRAIL CARD CUSTOMER SERVICE AND REPLACEMENT EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRINTABLE SNAP APPLICATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP REPLACEMENT BENEFITS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SELF SUFFICIENCY ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
